Use Case Thickness PSI
Residential foot traffic3.5–4"3000
Residential garage / driveway4–5"3000–4000
Light commercial / retail4–5"4000
Commercial w/ forklift5–6"4000
Industrial warehouse (standard)6"4000
Heavy industrial / truck dock6–8"4000–5000
Mezzanine / equipment pad6–8"4000–5000

🏗️ Concrete (per yd³)

📈 Markup
Escalated material prices in effect
✂️ Control Joints (Saw Cut)
🔧 Specialty Sub / Vendor Items
Add-on costs for specialty subs (PT, epoxy dowels, coring, sealers, testing, etc.). Pass-through — not subject to markup.
🔄 Price Update Utility
Apply a uniform % change to all material prices at once (for quarterly price updates from your supplier).
%
Updates: concrete (all PSI), rebar, mesh, forms, labor. Markup/waste % untouched.
➕ Add-Ons
Estimates earthwork from your slab and footing measurements. Overdig and haul-off only — not part of the concrete bid unless explicitly included.
Overdig / Working Room (ft each side)
Swell Factor (%)
Haul-off rate ($/CY)
Compact/Backfill rate ($/CY)

Crew Size

🏷️ Sub Quote Comparison
Enter sub quotes to compare against your estimate. Low bid highlighted green. Amounts are total $ for that line item.
📈 Market Benchmarks
El Paso / West Texas area typical ranges (2025-2026). Compare to your current bid.
🔀 Bid Alternates
Add additive (+) or deductive (−) alternates to the base bid. Included totals shown below.
💳 Payment Schedule
Define milestone payments as % of total bid. Must total 100%.
GC holds this % of each draw until final
📊 Bid Scenarios (A/B/C) ▶
Snapshot current bid to compare pricing scenarios side by side.
A — —
B — —
C — —
Scenario OH% Prof% Total Bid $/yd³
📝 Change Order Log
Track approved COs against the original bid. Positive = additive, negative = deductive.
📋 Addendum Log
Track GC addenda during bid period. Note what changed and any cost impact.
☑️ Pre-Bid Checklist
Track bid-prep tasks per project. Check off as you go.
🧑‍🔧 Crew Labor Builder
Define your crew composition and hours to back-check labor budget against bid.
📞 Material Quote Tracker
Track supplier quotes with expiry dates. "Use" applies price directly to pricing fields. Expires in <7 days turns amber; expired turns red.
Unit: concrete = $/yd³ · rebar = $/LF · mesh = $/SF · other = $/unit
🏆 Bid Intelligence
Log bid results to track win rate, avg margin, and pattern your wins vs losses over time.
Log a Result:
📅 Pour Log / Daily Report
Track each pour event — date, element, actual yd³, weather, crew, notes. Auto-totals vs estimate.
Log a Pour:
Date
Element / Area
Actual yd³
Crew Size
Weather
🧫 Concrete Test Results (ACI QC)
Log slump, air, temp, and cylinder break results per pour. Flags failures automatically.
Add Test Record:
Date
Pour / Ticket ID
Slump (in)
Air %
Temp (°F)
Spec PSI
7-day PSI
28-day PSI
Cylinders
📏 As-Built vs. Estimate
Enter actual ticket yd³ from ready-mix invoices. See over/under-pour vs estimated + $ cost impact at your concrete price.
* Over-pour costs are at your concrete $/yd³ (no markup — your cost). Under-pour may indicate measurement error or waste savings.
📋 RFI Log
Track Requests for Information sent to GC/Architect. Log number, subject, sent date, response date, and cost/schedule impact.
Log an RFI:
RFI #
Subject
Date Sent
Date Answered
Impact
Notes / Response Summary
📁 Submittal Log
Track mix designs, rebar shop drawings, material certs, and any other items requiring GC/EOR approval before work begins.
Add Submittal:
Sub #
Description
Date Submitted
Date Approved
Status
📇 GC / Owner Contact Book
Your relationship database — store GC contacts, load to project, track outreach.
Add Contact:
Name
Company
Phone
Email
Notes (type of work, relationship, last project, etc.)
⏱️ T&M Change Order Tracker
Track extra work on time & materials basis — crew hours + materials. Print a T&M ticket to submit with your pay app.
Add T&M Entry:
Date
Description
Labor:
Role
Count
Hours
$/hr
Materials (optional):
Material description
Mat. Cost $
T&M entries persist in localStorage (global). Print ticket anytime to submit to GC.

⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts

Element Types
1 Slab
4 Grade Beam
2 Footing
5 Curb
3 Wall
6 Pier
Drawing Tools
R Rectangle
L Line
P Polygon
S Select
Actions
Ctrl+Z Undo
Ctrl+Y Redo
Esc Cancel poly
Ctrl+S Save
Ctrl+R Recalculate
F9 Recalculate
Ctrl+Scroll Zoom
Space+drag: Pan
Ctrl++ Zoom In
Ctrl+− Zoom Out
Ctrl+0 Fit View
Shift+draw: snap/square
Middle click Pan
👁 eye Excl. from bid
E Edit selected
Del Delete selected
M Ruler (measure)
Tip: Double-click to close a polygon. Select a measurement then press E to edit its dimensions.
